name: White Chocolate Cream Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the white chocolate-flavored baking bar.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over water in a small saucepan; let stand for 1 minute.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring until the gelatin dissolves. Add the grated baking bar and stir constantly until it melts; cool slightly.
4. Combine whipping cream and gelatin mixture in a mixing bowl; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until thickened. Stir in vanilla.
5. Makes 3 cups.
Source: Christmas with Southern Living 1989
